name: Peas Pilav
recipeIngredient: 1.5 cups water, or water & tomato juice
1 cup long grain white rice (or basmati)
Makes: 4-6 servings as a main dish.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatoes, yogurt, garlic, ginger, coriander, cumin, garam masala, cinnamon, pepper, salt, and turmeric in a bowl.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and green chiles; sauté until onion is soft.
3. Stir in cumin seeds and cook 1 minute.
4. Add tomato mixture to the bowl with ingredients for step 1. Cover and simmer on low heat, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes.
5. Pour in water (or water & tomato juice) and cilantro; stir well.
6. Bring to a boil, then add rice, peas, and potatoes.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until the rice and potatoes are tender, about 20-30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Stir in garam masala before serving.
Garam masala is a spice blend that can be found in most Indian groceries or can be made from scratch.
